_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values.
simc_string:
mage="YourChar"
level=80
race=...
region=eu
server=...
role=spell
spec=fire

talents=...

head=,...
_comment_discord: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal. discord_channel_id = channel where /wishlist messages are posted.
_comment_raidsid: Your raidsid cookie from raidbots.com (F12 → Application → Cookies). Refresh if sims start failing.
_comment_runs: difficulty must be 'raid-heroic' or 'raid-mythic'. instance_id -91 = Season 1 Raids.
_comment_timeout: How many minutes to wait for each sim before giving up.
_comment_failure: Send a Discord message if a sim fails or times out.
